docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,621.50 FILED BY ESTRADA, ERIN SHAMASH, ELIAS AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, ROBERT GLENN SARDELLA, CYNTHIA E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, ROBERT GLENN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SARDELLA, CYNTHIA E.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-26-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-09-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL. DEFTS FAILED TO APPEAR.
NEW ADDRESS FOR ERIN ESTRADA SUBMITTED IN COURT: 433 FILLMORE ST. SAN FRANCISCO CA 94117
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED SEPT 1, 2005 8:30 AM. $10.00 FEE PAID.
DEFENDANTS FILED THEIR CORRECT HOME ADDRESS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-09-2005, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-08-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-08-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-05-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES DO NOT AGREE TO JUDGE PRO TEMPORE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, ERIN SHAMASH, ELIAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, ROBERT GLENN SARDELLA, CYNTHIA E. $2,621.50 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,643.50, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
